# coJournalist

> AI-powered local news monitoring platform for journalists and newsrooms.

coJournalist helps journalists monitor websites, government sources, social media, and local news on automated schedules. When something matches, it sends an email alert.

## What it does

- **Page Scout** — Monitors any URL for content changes. Detects new text, documents, or updates and checks them against your criteria using AI.
- **Smart Scout** — AI-curated local news digest. Searches across sources in your area or topic, filters for relevance, and deduplicates across runs.
- **Social Scout** — Monitors social media profiles (Instagram, X, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok) for new or removed posts matching your criteria.
- **Civic Scout** — Monitors local council websites for new meeting minutes and extracts commitments and promises with due dates.
- **Scrape** — On-demand extraction from any URL, returning structured data in JSON, markdown, or CSV.
- **Feed & Export** — Aggregates findings into an atomic knowledge base; generates article drafts from collected units.

## API

coJournalist exposes a REST API for programmatic access. API keys can be created from the dashboard.

Base URL: `https://www.cojournalist.ai/api/v1`

Key endpoints:
- `GET /v1/units` — retrieve information units from your feed
- `GET /v1/scouts` — list your active scouts
- `POST /v1/scouts/{name}/run` — trigger a scout run
- `GET /v1/feed/export` — export feed as markdown or JSON

Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>`

Full API documentation is available in the dashboard under **Agents → API**.

## Intended users

Journalists, researchers, newsrooms, and civic watchdogs who need to monitor public sources systematically without writing scrapers.

## Tech

SvelteKit frontend, FastAPI backend, DynamoDB, AWS EventBridge scheduling, Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite for AI analysis, Firecrawl for web scraping, Apify for social media.

## Links

- App: https://www.cojournalist.ai
- Pricing: https://www.cojournalist.ai/pricing
